_meta.source: FSSAI Food Safety and Standards Act 2006 + FSS (Food Products Standards and Food Additives) Regulations 2011 + Amendments up to 2023
_meta.note: Use for server-side cross-referencing against AI-extracted ingredient lists. Always cite regulation when flagging.

banned_additives.name: Red 2G
banned_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Food Products Standards) Regulations 2011, Schedule II
banned_additives.reason: Suspected carcinogen; metabolises to aniline in the body. Banned across India.

banned_additives.name: Amaranth
banned_additives.regulation: FSSAI Schedule II; also banned in USA by FDA
banned_additives.reason: Linked to tumours in animal studies. Prohibited in all food products in India.

banned_additives.name: Potassium Bromate
banned_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS Act 2006; Prevention of Food Adulteration Rules
banned_additives.reason: Classified as possible carcinogen (IARC Group 2B). Banned in India, EU, Canada, China.

banned_additives.name: Hexamethylene Tetramine
banned_additives.reason: Releases formaldehyde in acidic conditions. Banned in India for all food use.

banned_additives.name: Citrus Red 2
banned_additives.reason: Carcinogenic in animal studies. Not permitted in India.

banned_additives.name: Dimethyl Polysiloxane
banned_additives.regulation: FSSAI; banned specifically in edible oils and fats
banned_additives.reason: Banned for use in edible oils under Indian regulations.

restricted_additives.name: Tartrazine
restricted_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Food Products Standards) Regulations 2011, Part II
restricted_additives.concern: Linked to hyperactivity in children. EU requires warning label 'may have an adverse effect on activity and attention in children'.

restricted_additives.name: Sunset Yellow FCF
restricted_additives.concern: Part of the Southampton Six colours linked to hyperactivity in children. Requires declaration on label.

restricted_additives.name: Allura Red AC
restricted_additives.concern: Southampton Six colour. Linked to hyperactivity in children. Lower limit applies in India vs EU.

restricted_additives.name: Sodium Benzoate
restricted_additives.max_limit_note: 250mg/kg in most beverages; 1000mg/kg in jams and pickles
restricted_additives.concern: Reacts with Vitamin C (ascorbic acid) to form benzene, a known carcinogen. Presence of both E211 + Vitamin C in same product is a specific red flag.

restricted_additives.name: Potassium Sorbate
restricted_additives.concern: Generally recognised as safe at permitted levels. Concerns arise at higher concentrations.

restricted_additives.name: Monosodium Glutamate
restricted_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Labelling and Display) Regulations 2020 — must be declared
restricted_additives.concern: Must be declared on label as 'contains added flavour enhancer (INS 621)'. High doses may cause headaches, flushing in sensitive individuals. Prohibited in baby/infant food.

restricted_additives.name: TBHQ
restricted_additives.regulation: FSSAI; used in edible oils and fats
restricted_additives.concern: At high doses, animal studies show precancerous stomach tumours. Banned in Japan. Restricted to 200mg/kg in India.

restricted_additives.name: Butylated Hydroxyanisole
restricted_additives.concern: Possible carcinogen (IARC 2B). Accumulates in body fat. Restricted to 200mg/kg in fats and oils.

restricted_additives.name: Butylated Hydroxytoluene
restricted_additives.concern: Endocrine disruptor concerns. Restricted use; may affect thyroid function at high doses.

restricted_additives.name: Aspartame
not_permitted_in: products for phenylketonuria patients without PKU warning
restricted_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Food Products Standards) Regulations 2011; IARC classified as possibly carcinogenic (Group 2B) in 2023
restricted_additives.concern: Must carry warning: 'Contains phenylalanine' for PKU patients. IARC 2023 classified as possibly carcinogenic at very high doses.

restricted_additives.name: Saccharin
restricted_additives.concern: Must be declared on label. Historically linked to bladder cancer in animal studies (since refuted for humans at normal doses).

restricted_additives.name: Sulphite Ammonia Caramel
restricted_additives.regulation: FSSAI; Centre for Science in Public Interest flagged 4-MEI content
restricted_additives.concern: Class IV caramel (used in cola drinks) contains 4-methylimidazole (4-MEI), a possible carcinogen. FSSAI has been reviewing limits.

restricted_additives.name: Sodium Nitrite
restricted_additives.concern: Can form nitrosamines (carcinogens) when heated or combined with amines. WHO classifies processed meats containing nitrites as Group 1 carcinogen.

restricted_additives.name: Carrageenan
restricted_additives.concern: Prohibited in infant formula and baby food. Some animal studies suggest gut inflammation. Generally safe in adults at permitted levels.

trans_fat_rules.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Food Products Standards and Food Additives) 5th Amendment Regulations 2021

limit.description: Trans fatty acids must not exceed 2% of total fat content in oils, fats, and food products from 1 Jan 2022.

trans_fat_rules.note: Products with partially hydrogenated oils (PHO/PHVO/Vanaspati) are highest risk.

sugar_rules.declaration_note: Products with >22.5g sugar per 100g must prominently display sugar content. 'No added sugar' claim requires <0.5g sugar per 100g.

salt_sodium_rules.note: Indian diets are already high in sodium. Flag if a single product contributes >30% of daily sodium limit.

required_on_label: Ingredient list in descending order of weight

baby_food_prohibited_additives.regulation: FSSAI FSS (Food for Infant Nutrition) Regulations 2020
baby_food_prohibited_additives.note: Any product marketed for children under 3 years must not contain these additives.

helper_functions_note.cross_reference_logic: Extract ingredient list from product (via Gemini or label scan). Match each ingredient against banned_additives[].also_known_as and restricted_additives[].also_known_as arrays. Check E-codes and common names. For trans fat: check ingredients_text for high_risk_ingredients strings. For sugar: compare nutrition.sugar against thresholds. Return array of violations with regulation citation.
